title: helichrysum aureum var. serotinum
intro: Helichrysum aureum var. serotinum, also known as Yellow Everlasting, is a variety of flowering plant in the daisy family that is native to Australia. This plant is prized for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects, making it useful in treating a range of health issues. The health benefits of Helichrysum aureum var. serotinum are numerous, including reducing inflammation and pain, improving wound healing, and acting as an antiseptic to prevent infection. In herbal preparations, Helichrysum aureum var. serotinum is commonly used as an essential oil, which can be applied topically or inhaled to harness its therapeutic properties.
